scripts.docker: docker-compose down --remove-orphans --volumes && docker container prune -f && docker-compose up --build -d
scripts.env:all: bash -c 'failed=0; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-dev ./apps/worker/.env || failed=1; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-dev ./apps/backend/.env || failed=1; bash ./gen.sh Sayr sayr-dev ./apps/start/.env || failed=1; exit $failed'
scripts.env:ps:all: powershell -Command "./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-dev ./apps/worker/.env; ./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-dev ./apps/backend/.env; ./gen.ps1 Sayr sayr-dev ./apps/start/.env"
